related_articles.context: Prior TeamPCP-via-Checkmarx downstream — same threat actor, same Trivy-rooted access chain, different downstream package.
Adjacent May 2026 dev-tools supply-chain compromise (different actor, different ecosystem, same pattern: security tooling weaponised against developer pipelines).
Earlier (late March) TeamPCP intrusion that used credentials from the same Trivy compromise — anchor for the campaign timeline the article describes.
